ref: Why don't you start letting your families marry into our families and ours marry into yours?
text: Cha ti ŋa kimɔbaan ki li yoor tɔb aabisatiib.
translated: The child is learning to ride a bicycle.

ref: I want you and your descendants to have many children, so people will live everywhere on earth.
text: “Ni maa ki too pɔr kpee, aan niyaabitiib ga pɔr gbiin dulnyaa wee ni.”
translated: When we go to the farm, our grandmothers also go to the farm to weed with us.

ref: The smell of the burning offering pleased the Lord, and he said: Never again will I punish the earth for the sinful things its people do. All of them have evil thoughts from the time they are young, but I will never destroy everything that breathes, as I did this time.
text: Uwumbɔr aah ŋun kitork ngbaan aanun na, le ni piir usui, le u bui ubaa ke, “Maan ki puun lii kitiŋ pu kina daalbaadaal, ki joo cha unibɔn aah ŋa pu na. M nyi ke unibɔn aah laa diin ki joo cha na, waalandak ye titunwanbir la. Din ki joo cha, maan ki bii tiwanfuurkaan mɔmɔk, ke maah ŋa pu n‑yoonn mue na.
translated: When the old man had finished speaking, he looked at his son and said, “My son, I will tell you a story, and you will go and do it. If you do it, you will be a rich man, and you will be the chief of our clan. If you do it, my son, you will have many wives and children, and you will be a great man.

ref: Jacob told them to say to Esau, “Master, I am your servant! I have lived with Laban all this time,
text: U nan bui bi ke bi ti bui Esɔ ke, “Min Jakob, saanaagbiija na, le ban m tuk maaninkpel Esɔ ke m buen Labann do ni yunn sakpen a, le dandana wee m ban ke m gir kun ni.
translated: And the man said to him, "I am Jacob, your mother's brother, and these are my children, and the herds are the herds of Laban, and all that you see is mine."

ref: and said, “Please come to my home where I can serve you.
text: le ki bui bi ke, “Ndindatiib, taa jer ndo man, kal ki fuur man; m bi do ke m chann nimi tichann la.
translated: And then he said, “Ndindatiib, come and take your child, and let us go; I have come to take you to your father’s house.
